raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> - home depot credit card was used in XXXX XXXX  for {$890.00} around noon - XXXX was the cashier XX/XX/year> - I received an email saying thank you for your purchase from XXXX XXXX - that's when I realized that something was incorrect XX/XX/year> - called home depot fraud department and put in a fraud claim - was notified that it would take 30 days to investigate. home depot responded back to me about a week later stating that i was found responsible for the charges for 2 reasons - 1 ) i didn't claim it was fraud ( even though the document that they sent said regarding your fraud claim and 2 ) they couldn't disprove it was me ( but also didn't check their surveillance for the investigation ) called home depot fraud department again disputing and the rep on the phone hung up on me for being unprofessional filed XXXX police reports- XXXX in XXXX XXXX for identity theft and XXXX in XXXX XXXX  for fraud
